name: logo-generator
description: Generate SVG logo concepts and polished showcase presentations from a plugin-local skill.

interface.shortDescription: Create logo concepts, SVG variants, and showcase presentations.
interface.longDescription: Generate multiple logo directions for a product or brand, iterate on SVG concepts, and produce higher-end presentation assets with plugin-local references and scripts.
interface.defaultPrompt: Create several logo directions for my product and prepare an SVG showcase.
